zh.lifeSummary: 當Joyce de Durvassal於1391年出生在英國瓦維其可爾斯白納爾時，她的父親William de Durvassal42歲，母親Alison de Sulney14歲。她於1414年與William Pipe Swyfen在英國德比夏爾奧維 哈登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1432年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joyce de Durvassal于1391年出生在英国瓦維其可爾斯白納爾时，她的父亲William de Durvassal42岁，母亲Alison de Sulney14岁。她于1414年与William Pipe Swyfen在英国德比夏爾奧維 哈登结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1432年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently from the Norman male name Josce (Middle English Josse), which in turn is from Jodocus, a Latinized form of a Breton name, Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, borne by a 7th-century Breton saint. The name was in use in England among Breton followers of William the Conqueror. However, although this was fairly common as a male given name in the Middle Ages, it had virtually died out by the 14th century. There is evidence of its use as a girl's name from the 16th century onwards in parishes with strong Puritan links, which suggests that it may have been associated with the vocabulary word joy; see Joy . It was strongly revived in the 19th century under the influence of popular fiction. It is borne by characters in Mrs Henry Wood's East Lynne ( 1861 ) and Edna Lyall's In the Golden Days ( 1885 ). Modern use may well have been influenced also by the common Irish surname derived from the medieval Norman male name. See also Joss .

en.lifeSummary: When Joyce de Durvassal was born in 1391, in Spernall, Warwickshire, England, her father, William de Durvassal, was 42 and her mother, Alison de Sulney, was 14. She married William Pipe Swyfen in 1414, in Over Haddon, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1432, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joyce de Durvassal est née en 1391, à Spernall, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Durvassal, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alison de Sulney, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé William Pipe Swyfen en 1414, à Over Haddon, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1432, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joyce de Durvassal 1391 in Spernall, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Durvassal 42 und ihre Mutter Alison de Sulney 14. Sie hat 1414 in Over Haddon, Derbyshire, England William Pipe Swyfen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1432 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joyce de Durvassal è nata il nel 1391 nel Spernall, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, William de Durvassal, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Alison de Sulney, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato William Pipe Swyfen nel 1414, nel Over Haddon, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1432, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joyce de Durvassalが1391年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアスペルナルで生まれた時，父William de Durvassalは42歳，母Alison de Sulneyは14歳であった。1414年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアオバー ハッドオンでWilliam Pipe Swyfenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1432年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joyce de Durvassal(이)가 1391년 영국 워윅실르 스퍼널에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Durvassal(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alison de Sulney(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1414년 영국 더비실르 버 하던에서 William Pipe Swyfen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joyce de Durvassal nasceu em 1391, em Spernall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Durvassal, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Alison de Sulney, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com William Pipe Swyfen em 1414, em Over Haddon, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1432, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joyce de Durvassal родилась в 1391 г. в местности спирналл, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Durvassal было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alison de Sulney, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Pipe Swyfen в 1414 г. в местности овир хаддон, дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1432 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joyce de Durvassal nació en 1391, en Spernall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Durvassal, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Alison de Sulney, tenía 14 años. Se casó con William Pipe Swyfen en 1414, en Over Haddon, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1432, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años.
